text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's a fine afternoon day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly have the urge to go shopping somewhere I haven't been to
before. Along the way though, I get myself completely lost...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. I'm sorry to intrude.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Would you happen to be a trainer at Tracen Academy?
choice_data_list: Yeah, I am. Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I knew it. I believe I've seen you at school several times. I
recognized your face.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, you seem to be having some difficulties. What troubles
you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grateful for Grass Wonder's concern, I explain that it's my first time in
the area and I've gotten lost.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Now, that's a predicament indeed!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: If you do not object, I would be pleased to guide you to the school.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I was just on my way back, and as they say, "No road is
long with good company." ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I often come this way to buy items for my hobby, so I'm familiar with
the area. Just leave everything to me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Shall we be on our way?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take the generous student up on her offer, and we walk at a relaxed
pace toward the academy.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Phew... We're almost there now. Tracen is only a short distance from
here.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, the sun is already setting. I must have been walking too
leisurely... Forgive me.
choice_data_list:
No worries. I got to enjoy the view along the
way.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? You must have an appreciation for the fleeting nature of
things.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...When the evening comes, the sky remains beautiful, its crimson
hues ever-changing.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I could keep on watching forever... I'm afraid that's what kept me at
such a dallying pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Grass Wonder voices these musings, we come to a halt and gaze
together at the sky above. But suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gurgle...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, could it be?
choice_data_list: Sorry, that really ruined the moment...
Sorry, that really ruined the moment...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, not to worry. It was a long walk. You must be famished.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Here, I have the perfect thing for that. May I trouble you for a bit
more of your time?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If you'd like, I would be pleased to thank you by performing a
Nodate.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, an open-air tea ceremony. It's the elegant tradition of enjoying
tea while feeling the warm sunlight and fresh air.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Tea ceremony is one of my hobbies. I made the long journey today to
order matcha tea and sweets at my favorite store.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I have all the necessary items with me. What do you say?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Wonderful. ♪ Then I'll get everything ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder performs the ceremony, and we enjoy some delicious
tea and fine sweets.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: How was it?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Heehee, I'm glad to hear that. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The wonder and joy of tea is in its ability to satisfy both the body and
soul.
choice_data_list: Have you studied tea ceremony long?
Have you studied tea ceremony long?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, since I was a child.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Tea ceremony, flower arrangement, calligraphy, Japanese dance...
And a bit of the naginata polearm as well.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, they're just hobbies of mine that I take immense pleasure in
indulging.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I was born in America, but both my parents dearly love Japan.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
They explained the elegance of Japanese culture to me often... So I
naturally came to have an interest in it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There were fine instructors back home, so I asked my parents to let
me learn all that I could.
choice_data_list: You must really love Japanese culture.
You must really love Japanese culture.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, that I do!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I owe many important lessons to it—from civility and sincerity, to
consideration for others.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Though of course, I yet have much to learn.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I train every day to be polite and refined—to one day reach the
Japanese ideal of Yamato Nadeshiko.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh... I'm sorry. I've been going on and on about myself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Let's make our way back to the academy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After we part ways, I return to my room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder, the polite and refined student. I wonder what a racer
who serves tea ceremonies and smiles so peacefully can run like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Little did I know, my answer was to come much sooner than expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Notice to all trainers regarding the upcoming tryouts."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I receive an email containing the list of participants, and Grass
Wonder's name immediately catches my eye.
